sizing_rule.note: Position units scaled inversely to 20-day average daily range volatility. Baseline: $15,000 equity per 1 unit at median volatility. Units = (Baseline Capital / Current Daily Range Volatility) / $15,000. Maintains constant 35% max drawdown exposure across volatility regimes.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size inversely to the daily volatility of the instrument being traded, using a baseline unit size tied to account equity such that maximum drawdown exposure remains constant across different volatility regimes.
